summary: Validated the M7 Beta performance, memory, loading, and packaging surface with a local R2 measurement runner. The report now uses the contracted M7 Beta-scale artifact (sampleSize=36 across 3 scenarios and 12 seeds), records host memory RSS/heap before and after the run, captures reproducible Web startup/loading and M7 UI density proxies from the built web app, times save/load, and carries forward the prior desktop security concurrent ENOTEMPTY note as a serialized rerun pass.

tests_run.result: Listed active tasks; M7-PERFORMANCE-MEMORY-LOADING-001 is in progress.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-PERFORMANCE-MEMORY-LOADING-001 task + R2 evidence
tests_run.result: task and evidence JSON shapes validated; sampleSize=36; saveLoadMs=16.18; startupMs=183.23; desktopTreeHash=DD75741482BB065B361A8ED8CA0DB0081731315D0346562A3EC390248A193FD7

SIM-005 performance baseline passed on fixture m1.abstract-graph-30-world-state-v0; node v24.13.1; win32 x64; cpuCount=16; days=3650; finalDay=3650; finalRevision=3650; dayThroughputPerSecond=6091; p50StepNanoseconds=118900; p95StepNanoseconds=341500; p99StepNanoseconds=758700; saveByteLength=9980; saveNanoseconds=3471200; loadNanoseconds=4875600.
Node and Worker-compatible hashes matched for hello, command/query, save/load, M4 replay, M5 playable loop, and M6 Alpha loop.
Vite web build completed successfully; built app bundles and host-hash-canary assets.
Storybook build completed successfully and cleaned .tmp/storybook-static.
Playwright chromium suite passed: 21 tests, 21 passed.

Electron security preferences passed; preload exposes only the named bridge; renderer file navigation is restricted to the packaged renderer root; allowed IPC channels are desktop:getRuntimeInfo and desktop:setFullscreen.
Desktop package smoke output written to .tmp/desktop-package/MonsoonSovereigns-win32-x64 and packaged main, preload, renderer, and platform adapter artifacts.
Architecture boundaries passed; 43 test files passed; 353 tests passed; web 1 file and 9 tests passed.
format, lint, typecheck, and architecture checks passed.
No whitespace or patch formatting issues.

decisions.result: The R2 report uses the actual M7 Beta-scale artifact from apps/sim-runner (sampleSize=36; 3 scenarios; 12 seeds) instead of the earlier M1 30-node baseline, and marks the gate PASS_WITH_LIMITS because formal M7 thresholds are not frozen in the task metadata.

Host memory is recorded as RSS/heap before and after the Beta-scale run, using the current Windows x64 workstation as a proxy for low-end Windows rather than pretending it is a verified low-end machine.

Web startup/loading is measured from the built apps/web/dist served locally, with a fixed en-US navigator proxy to keep selectors stable and a read-model density proxy taken from the district list performance surface.

Desktop security/package smoke is recorded as a serialized rerun; the earlier concurrent ENOTEMPTY collision remains a known output-tree hazard from the prior evidence and is not treated as a product defect.

risks: The low-end Windows claim is still a proxy assumption; this host is a Windows x64 workstation and does not substitute for a true low-end endpoint.
The desktop security check is order-sensitive when run concurrently with desktop packaging because both commands touch the same output tree.
M7 thresholds are not frozen in task metadata, so the gate remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS rather than unconditional PASS.
requested_action: Review the R2 evidence report, the local measurement runner, and the serialized desktop security/package results, then accept or request changes.
